description: Style Note  remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flat strappy slip ons. Product Details  Green spaghetti top with thin and elasticated shoulder straps, embroidery on the neckline and above the hem, is elasticated on the front and at the back for comfort, tie-up detail on the front and an asymmetrical hem   Material and Care  Cotton  Gentle machine wash  Do not bleach and flat dry only  Use cold iron  Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
